mnemonics: V.I.D.E.O. - Very Important: Decrease Emissions Overall
keyPoints: Videoconferencing significantly reduces carbon emissions from travel.
It lowers operational costs associated with business travel (flights, hotels, per diems).
Advancements in technology have made virtual meetings a viable and effective alternative for most business communication.
commonMistakes: Overestimating the carbon footprint of the internet infrastructure needed for videoconferencing compared to the immense footprint of air travel.
Assuming all in-person meetings are essential and not evaluating which trips can be effectively replaced.
Underinvesting in quality audio-visual equipment, which can lead to ineffective meetings and a perception that virtual is an inferior substitute.
